text_en: Know ye that {our} brother Timothy is set at liberty; with whom, if he come shortly, I will see you.
text_es: Sabed que nuestro hermano Timoteo está suelto; con el cual, si viniere más presto, os iré á ver.

text_en: Salute all them that have the rule over you, and all the saints. They of Italy salute you.
text_es: Saludad á todos vuestros pastores, y á todos los santos. Los de Italia os saludan.

text_en: Grace {be} with you all. Amen. «{Written to the Hebrews from Italy, by Timothy.}»
text_es: La gracia sea con todos vosotros. Amén.
